prose:
Method–provenance block:
Property: total electronic energy (optimized) in eV
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) using the xtb backend
Geometry provenance: the ammonia coordinates from /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/geometry-optimize-validation/ammonia/ammonia.xyz were fully relaxed at the same GFN2-xTB level (ASE BFGS optimizer, fmax target 0.05 eV Å⁻¹); 4 optimization steps; converged = true. Optimized structure saved to /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/geometry-optimize-validation/ammonia/20260624-114243_ammonia_geometry_optimize/ammonia_xtb_opt.xyz.
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation – continuum models were off).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software: xtb through chemkit geometry-optimize skill (program field in result JSON: "xtb").
Convergence & caveats: optimization converged in 4 steps; no warnings were emitted by the engine. Semi-empirical GFN2-xTB energies are suitable for geometries and qualitative energetics but are not chemical-accuracy absolute energies.

Live log: the xtb stdout/stderr was streamed to the automatically generated geometry-optimize_20260624-114243.out file in the working directory while the run was executing (tail-f usable for full SCF/gradient history).

Headline result (GFN2-xTB//GFN2-xTB, gas phase): total energy = −120.44421 eV.
